metadata.description: Shared brand and marketing resources for social.plus. Two plugins: marketing-team (14 skills, full kit) and branding (3 skills, for non-marketing teammates who just need to stay on-brand).

plugins.name: marketing-team
plugins.description: Shared skills for the marketing team.

plugins.name: branding
plugins.description: Just brand voice + press release + design system. Pick this instead of marketing-team if you only need to stay on-brand.
